title: Claude Models Overview
description: Master the Claude model family tiers and the decision chain that turns them into production features.

lessons.title: Claude Family Overview
lessons.audioSummary: Master the Claude model family tiers and the decision chain that turns them into production features.

lessons.title: Opus / Sonnet / Haiku Positioning
lessons.audioSummary: Learn how to choose between Claude's three model tiers—Opus, Sonnet, and Haiku—and build production systems that survive growth and upgrades.

lessons.title: Family Pricing Shape
lessons.audioSummary: Learn how to choose the right Claude model tier and build a defensible decision-making chain for shipping production-grade AI features.

lessons.title: Context Windows Across the Family
lessons.audioSummary: Learn how to choose the right Claude model tier—Opus, Sonnet, or Haiku—and design your context strategy for production systems.

lessons.title: Family vs External Models
lessons.audioSummary: Learn how to choose between Claude's model tiers and external models, then operationalize that choice through a disciplined engineering pattern that covers prompts, tools, evaluation, and production deployment.

lessons.title: Picking a Family Tier
lessons.audioSummary: Learn how to pick the right Claude model tier—Opus, Sonnet, or Haiku—and build a defensible decision-making chain for shipping Claude-backed features into production.

title: Opus Deep Dive
description: Master Claude Opus 4.7 by treating AI development as a deliberate chain of engineering decisions: model selection, prompt design, tool integration, context strategy, evaluation, and production scaffolding.

lessons.title: Opus 4.7 Overview
lessons.audioSummary: Master Claude Opus 4.7 by treating AI development as a deliberate chain of engineering decisions: model selection, prompt design, tool integration, context strategy, evaluation, and production scaffolding.

lessons.title: 1M Context Capability
lessons.audioSummary: Master Claude Opus 4.7's 1-million-token context window by anchoring every build decision in user-facing metrics, picking the right model tier, designing structured prompts, wiring tools carefully, engineering your context strategy, building evaluation sets before shipping, and deploying with operational rigor.

lessons.title: Frontier Reasoning
lessons.audioSummary: Learn the complete engineering framework for building Claude Opus-backed systems in production, from model selection through deployment with evals and operational safety.

lessons.title: Cost & Latency Profile
lessons.audioSummary: Learn how to pick the right Claude model tier and operationalize it inside a production system by reasoning through a chain of interconnected engineering decisions.

lessons.title: Opus vs Sonnet Decision
lessons.audioSummary: Learn how to choose between Claude Opus and Sonnet by anchoring decisions in user-facing metrics, then optimizing for latency, cost, and quality alongside prompt design, tooling, evaluation, and production operations.

lessons.title: Opus Workload Patterns
lessons.audioSummary: Learn how to build production Claude features by anchoring decisions in user value, selecting the right model tier, designing prompts and tools methodically, and shipping with evals and operational safeguards.

title: Sonnet Deep Dive
description: Master Claude Sonnet 4.6 as a production-ready model by understanding its role in the price-quality-latency trade-off, learning the decision chain that makes Claude features work at scale, and building operational discipline around evals, monitoring, and incident response.

lessons.title: Opus-Sonnet Cascade
lessons.audioSummary: Learn the Opus-Sonnet cascade pattern: a systematic decision-making framework for building production Claude applications that balance cost, latency, and quality.

title: Haiku Deep Dive
description: Master Claude Haiku 4.5 as your default fast-and-cheap model by understanding when to use it, how to design prompts and tools around it, and how to operationalize it in production with evals and monitoring.

lessons.title: Haiku 4.5 Overview
lessons.audioSummary: Master Claude Haiku 4.5 as your default fast-and-cheap model by understanding when to use it, how to design prompts and tools around it, and how to operationalize it in production with evals and monitoring.

lessons.audioSummary: Master Claude Haiku for fast and cheap production work by anchoring decisions in user metrics, choosing the right model tier, and building evaluation loops before shipping.

lessons.title: Latency Targets

lessons.title: Cost Optimisation
lessons.audioSummary: Master cost optimization for Claude by treating AI development as a deliberate chain of decisions from model selection through production operations, with evaluation and monitoring at every step.

lessons.title: Haiku-First Design Pattern
lessons.audioSummary: Master the haiku-first design pattern: a systematic seven-step approach to building production Claude applications that balance cost, latency, and quality through deliberate model selection, prompt engineering, tooling, context strategy, evaluation, and operational scaffolding.

title: Model Selection

title: Claude Code
description: Learn how to set up and master Claude Code, a terminal-native AI coding agent, by understanding its core workflows, slash commands, configuration patterns, and when to use it effectively.

lessons.title: MCP Servers
